allow: PowerShell($j = \(Get-Command java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if \(-not $j -and $env:JAVA_HOME\) { $j = Join-Path $env:JAVA_HOME 'bin\\java.exe' }; "java=$j"; if \($j\) { & $j -version })
